## What you need before starting

- A working installation of **Onyx** on your computer.
- A mouse or trackpad that supports right-click actions (many Onyx actions use context menus). We definitely recommend using an external mouse as input device.
- The workshop data files in `sem-workshop/data/` or online ![https://github.com/brandmaier/lip2026-onyx-workshop/tree/main/sem-workshop/data](https://github.com/brandmaier/lip2026-onyx-workshop/tree/main/sem-workshop/data).
- Basic familiarity with SEM terms such as latent variables, loadings, residual variances, model fit, and nested model comparison.

## Installation

You can download the most recent version of Ωnyx for all operating systems here (including Windows, Mac OSX, and Unix/Linux here).

## Prerequistes

Ωnyx requires a JAVA runtime environment. If you haven’t installed JAVA, please download a recent version, for example OpenJDK (!https://openjdk.org/index.html](https://openjdk.org/index.html)).

## Download

For this workshop make sure to install the *Developer version / unstable*, which contains the latest features:

![https://onyx-sem.com/download/](https://onyx-sem.com/download/)
